{{Quote|PK units are my first recommendation for the espionage programming. After all, who notices a PK?|Vyn Narcassan|<ref name="The New Essential Guide to Droids">''[[The New Essential Guide to Droids]]''</ref>}}
'''Vyn Narcassan''' was a high-ranking [[Senate Bureau of Intelligence/Legends|Senate Bureau of Intelligence]] official during the time of the [[Separatist Crisis/Legends|Separatist Crisis]]. Just before the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], he claimed to have found an immensely secure communications channel linking [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatist]] factions with someone within the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] government. However, he was not taken seriously.

In his 20-year career he performed over 100 covert missions. When [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] became [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Galactic Emperor]], he successfully engineered his disappearance before [[Imperial Intelligence/Legends|Imperial Intelligence]] could eliminate him. He fathered two daughters, [[Vula Nelprin|Vula]] and [[Shalla Nelprin]].<ref name="Gamer" />

In [[8 ABY/Legends|8 ABY]], members of [[Wraith Squadron]] visited an exhibition on the history of Imperial Intelligence at the [[Galactic Museum/Legends|Galactic Museum]] on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. There, [[Myn Donos]] saw a hologram of Narcassan and noted that he bore an uncanny resemblance to fellow Wraith Shalla Nelprin.<ref name="Solo Command">''[[X-Wing: Solo Command]]''</ref>
